title: [MTR4] JR東日本 E235系 | JR East E235 series
description: Resource pack that adds JR E235-0 and E235-1000 series into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
**Please download the latest version**
# Orerview
The E235 series (E235系, E235-kei) is a DC electric multiple unit (EMU) commuter and suburban train type operated by East Japan Railway Company (JR East). The commuter variant was introduced on Yamanote Line services in November 2015, and the suburban variant entered service on the Sōbu Rapid and Yokosuka Lines on 21 December 2020.

The E235 series design was developed from the earlier E233 series trains, and like the E233 and E231 series trains, the new E235 series trains have stainless steel bodies. The exterior styling was overseen by the industrial design firm Ken Okuyama Design. Baggage racks and hand-holds have been lowered 5 cm (1.97 in) for easier access and the seats are 1 cm (0.39 in) wider than previous trains. The car interiors also have up to 36 digital monitors for various informational displays. The window behind the drivers cab has been lowered so children can get a better view of the operator of the cars. The temperature of each car is also monitored; the system can predict the number of passengers at upcoming stations and adjust the temperature for passenger comfort. This information is also communicated to a smart phone application, allowing customers to choose in which car to ride based on their temperature preference. In 2017, the E235 series received the Laurel Prize.
# This pack includes
![E235-0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc7542f8ae8b915d132f36d2c5895756017da6e2.png)
![E235-1000](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29e761abd8471dfc52100d21393c55f4675b1b86.png)
### New motor sound for:
- E235 series
# My suggestion:
> Acceleration and deceleration:
- E235-0: 2.9 - 3.2 km/h/s
- E235-1000: 2.5 - 2.9 km/h/s
> Average speed:
- E235-0: 60 - 120 km/h,
- E235-1000: 100 - 120 km/h
# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, East Japan Railway Company.
**Tested on Minecraft 1.20.1 MTR 4.0.2 Hotfix Forge**
